output.summary: Int5-MLP/int6-attn quantization funds an 11-layer Relu^2 Transformer with SmearGate/Bigram context, SWA, and TTT-SGD prep for sliding-window eval.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT-SGD fine-tunes the entire model on validation data before sliding-window scoring.
techniques: Mixed int5-MLP and int6-attention quantization to fit an 11-layer Transformer
SmearGate plus BigramHash injects learned bigram context prior to the stack
SWA checkpoint averaging plus TTT-SGD adaptation paired with sliding-window evaluation
